name: Chicken Like the Colonel's
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Powder chicken bouillon (or 4 cubes mashed)
recipeInstructions:
or 4 cubes mashed. There are actually 11 spices in the above combination, but an additional 3 ingredients were necessary to derive that special flavor. Place all ingredients in a blender and blend on/off for 3-4 minutes to pulverize, or rub through a fine strainer. Store in an airtight container so it will not lose potency. Makes about 3/4 cup.
To use with flour: Add 1 oz mix to cup of flour for coating chicken.
